description: Analyze the hydrogen bond network between streptavidin and its high-affinity ligand, biotin, using crystal structure PDB:1STP. Identify the 'first shell' protein residues that form direct polar contacts (hydrogen bonds) with the bound biotin molecule (residue name: BTN). Create an educational, publication-quality visualization highlighting these specific hydrogen bonds, with biotin and the interacting residues shown as sticks and the hydrogen bonds as dashed lines. Save the figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/streptavidin_hbond.png. Write a text report summarizing the interaction to ~/PyMOL_Data/biotin_hbond_report.txt. The report must mention the ligand identifier (BTN or Biotin), state the total count of hydrogen-bonding residues identified, and list the specific protein residues (including both residue name and number) forming these bonds.
